name: HHV6A_full_genome
description: Human herpesvirus 6A (HHV-6A) beta-herpesvirus: linear dsDNA ~159 kb with 8 kb direct repeats DRL and DRR flanking the ~143 kb unique long region. DR regions contain pac1/pac2 cleavage-packaging signals and the immediate-early genes U17/U18. HHV-6A and HHV-6B share ~90% nucleotide identity, are taxonomically distinct species, and exhibit different cell tropism (HHV-6A: CD4 T cells / CNS; HHV-6B: T cells, principal agent of exanthem subitum / roseola). Both can integrate into host chromosomes at telomeric (TTAGGG)n repeats, producing chromosomally integrated HHV-6 (ciHHV-6) in ~1% of the human population.
expected_copy_count: 1 episomal/integrated copy per cell; integration via telomere TTAGGG
